items.name_en: M81534 Purple Suit Wallet Series New Men's Slim Wallet This Multiple wallet recreates a slim design using Monogram Macassar material. It can hold cash, credit cards, business cards, and tickets while fitting in a pocket, defining a method of carrying daily necessities with contemporary practicalism. It is also an excellent choice for a gift. Dimensions: 11.5 x 9.0 x 1.5 cm

M81561 Black
Crafted from grained Taurillon leather, this piece features a color contrast between the inside and outside. The LV letter slide buckle references the Capucines handbag's closure design. items.name_cn:
M83649
Made of Monogram canvas with a colorful leather lining, the "Portefeuil Lisa" is a compact wallet featuring a coin pocket with a strap and an LV circle pull. Its size is also charming for small bags and clutches. Inside, it has a bill compartment, 2 flat pockets, and 4 card slots.
Size: 9 11.5 1.5

items.name_en: M83689 Rabbit🐰! From the collaboration series between Louis Vuitton Artistic Director Nicolas Ghesquière and Chinese artist Sun Yitian, known for depicting mass-produced items with vibrant brushstrokes. The Zippy Large Wallet has a capacity comparable to a small bag. It features a smartphone pocket and can hold keys, a passport, credit cards, and cash. Easily stores personal essentials, the perfect travel companion. Dimensions 19Cmx10cm.

items.name_en: Market Best Version (Original Quality) Authentic Pattern
items.name_cn:
Market Best Version (Original Quality) Authentic Pattern
【Guaranteed Imported Top Grain Leather, No Split Leather, No Microfiber】
Long Zip Wallet
Beige and Black Oblique Print
Number: 2ESBC252YSE_H05E
This long zip wallet is understated yet elegant. Crafted from beige and black Oblique print fabric with a black smooth leather interior. The center zip pocket holds coins, while the double cash compartment and 12 card slots provide ample storage. Elegant and spacious, it is an ideal daily companion.
Main: Cotton, Tech Fabric
Lining: Leather, Tech Fabric
Zip Main Compartment
12 Card Slots
Internal Zip Pocket
Double Cash Compartment
2 Pockets with Triangle Linings
Front with Metal-Plated Copper Alloy Dior Logo
Interior with Dior Embossed Logo
Includes Dust Bag
Size: 19.8 x 11 x 2.5 cm (L x H x W)
Fits Credit Cards
